The '''''Blue Queen''''' was a [[Corsair-class cruiser|''Corsair''-class cruiser]] that was used by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group [[Dharus' Buccaneers]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="P&P">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
